description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ayufan/rock64-dockerfiles:bookworm Docker image and define variables GITHUB_REPO, GITHUB_USER, PIPELINE_URL, RELEASE_NAME, VERSION as shown. Define stages draft, build, pre-release, release and a before_script that exports CHANGES from the tag message and DESCRIPTION combining CHANGES and the pipeline URL. In the build stage add a debian-bookworm-minimal-arm64 job (and a manual build_manual job that allows failure) that runs make "$CI_JOB_NAME", then github-release upload --tag "${VERSION}" --name "$(basename *.xz)" --file *.xz, and finally git clean -fdx, and both run only on tag pipelines (the manual one runs when triggered manually). In the draft stage add a draft job that runs github-release release --tag "${VERSION}" --name "$RELEASE_NAME" --description "$DESCRIPTION" --target "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" --draft, only on tags. In the pre-release stage add a pre-release job with environment pre-release (URL pointing to the GitHub release page) that runs github-release edit --tag "${VERSION}" --name "$RELEASE_NAME" --description "$DESCRIPTION" --pre-release, only on tags; and in the release stage add a manual release job with environment release (same URL) that runs github-release edit --tag "${VERSION}" --name "$RELEASE_NAME" --description "$DESCRIPTION", only on tags.
